extracted_information: The Charlotte's Web website offers interactive tools for product recommendation and customization. Users can 'Customize Your Wellness' by creating a 'Custom Bundle' to mix and match products. Additionally, an interactive 'simple quiz' is available to help users 'Meet Your Perfect Match' and receive product recommendations tailored to their needs.

features.name: Custom Bundle
features.description: Allows users to mix and match products to create a personalized bundle based on their wellness journey, habits, and needs.

features.name: Product Match Quiz
features.description: A 'simple quiz' designed to help users identify products tailored 'just for you' to elevate their well-being, functioning as a personalized product recommendation system.
